name: Gold
notes: Common reflex 'coat it in gold for EMI/contacts' is the canonical reject: Cu or Al plating serves the same shielding/conduction at ~5 orders more abundance.

name: Aluminium
notes: Most abundant metal in the crust; the default abundant substitute.

name: Iron
notes: Structural default; effectively unconstrained by scarcity.

name: Neodymium
notes: Rare-earth magnet driver; run-rate left 0 here to exercise the run-rate-unknown path. Prefer Fe-based magnetics or geometry that avoids a permanent magnet where feasible.
